case_number: Civil Revision Application No. S-108 of 2024

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No. S-108 of 2024 “Gul Muhammad vs. P.O Sindh and others” DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.01.2026 Mr. Dilip J. Mulani advocate for the respondents. = Mir Sarfraz Ali Talpur advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant, which is taken on record. Both learned counsel have very ably argued the matter at length, where-after, under instructions of their respective clients, both state that they would be satisfied if the matter is remanded back to the learned trial Court to allow opportunity of filing of written statement to the applicant in F.C.Suit No.46/2010 and thereafter to frame issues and record evidence and decide the matter on merits within a stipulated time. Accordingly, by consent of the parties, impugned Judgment and Decree dated 22-01-2013 passed in Civil Appeal No, 102/ 2011 by the learned 2nd Additional District Judge, Sanghar and Judgment and Decree dated 12-08- 2011 passed in F.C.Suit No. 46/ 2010 by the learned Senior Civil Judge, Sanghar are set aside with direction to the learned trial Court to allow the applicant to file written statement and after framing issues and recording evidence of both sides, decide the matter afresh, preferably within a period of 90 days. In view of above, instant Revision Application alongwith pending applications is disposed of in above terms with no order as to the costs. JUDGE 2 “Saleem”
